title: AWSSSMContactsPlanProperties
description: Engagement Plan for a SSM Incident Manager Contact.. Source:- https://github.com/aws-cloudformation/aws-cloudformation-rpdk.git

ContactId.description: Contact ID for the AWS SSM Incident Manager Contact to associate the plan.

Stages.description: The stages that an escalation plan or engagement plan engages contacts and contact methods in.

RotationIds.description: Rotation Ids to associate with Oncall Contact for engagement.

ContactTargetInfo.description: The contact that SSM Incident Manager is engaging during an incident.

ContactId.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the contact.

IsEssential.description: A Boolean value determining if the contact's acknowledgement stops the progress of stages in the plan.

ContactTargetInfo.title: AWSSSMContactsPlanContactTargetInfoDefinition

ChannelTargetInfo.description: Information about the contact channel that SSM Incident Manager uses to engage the contact.

ChannelId.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the contact channel.

RetryIntervalInMinutes.description: The number of minutes to wait to retry sending engagement in the case the engagement initially fails.

ChannelTargetInfo.title: AWSSSMContactsPlanChannelTargetInfoDefinition

Stage.description: A set amount of time that an escalation plan or engagement plan engages the specified contacts or contact methods.

DurationInMinutes.description: The time to wait until beginning the next stage.

Targets.description: The contacts or contact methods that the escalation plan or engagement plan is engaging.

Stage.title: AWSSSMContactsPlanStageDefinition

Targets.description: The contacts or contact methods that the escalation plan or engagement plan is engaging.
Targets.title: AWSSSMContactsPlanTargetsDefinition
